overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city district, starting from an elevated overlook of a pedestrian plaza, proceeding along walkways past towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, crossing a street intersection, and continuing along a neon-lit sidewalk. The footage is clearly from a video game engine with high-quality rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an elevated view overlooking a spacious pedestrian plaza filled with palm trees and scattered pedestrians. The camera moves steadily along a railing, revealing futuristic glass skyscrapers in the distance adorned with holographic billboards. The scene is brightly lit by midday sun with clear skies.

segments.scene_description: Moving along an elevated walkway enclosed by buildings on one side and a railing overlooking the street on the other. A massive yellow billboard reading IT'S BIG dominates the left while the Fourth Wall building stands on the right. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction as vehicles pass on the street below.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant holographic advertisements. The camera looks up to reveal the immense scale of the buildings against the bright sky before proceeding to cross the street at the marked crosswalk. The Fourth Wall building shifts from right to left as the camera moves through the intersection.

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and commercial storefronts featuring bright neon signage. The Fourth Wall building is now visible in the distance on the right side. The environment maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with tall buildings and digital advertisements visible further down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated overlook of a sunny pedestrian plaza into the dense, neon-lit heart of a cyberpunk city district. It begins by gliding along a railing above a spacious plaza filled with palm trees, where the midday sun illuminates distant glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards. As the camera proceeds along an elevated walkway, the view narrows between the Fourth Wall building and a massive yellow billboard reading IT'S BIG, while traffic flows on the street below. The scene then expands as the camera approaches a major intersection, tilting upward to capture the immense scale of holographic advertisements before crossing the street at a marked crosswalk. Finally, the movement settles onto a sidewalk lined with commercial storefronts and bright neon signage, with the Fourth Wall building receding into the distance among the towering digital architecture.
